Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class FlowSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowSettings
public class FlowSettings extends Metadata

Java class for FlowSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="canDebugFlowAsAnotherUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesEnforceApexCpuTimeLimit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesFormulaEnforceDataAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesFormulaGenerateHtmlOutput" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailSimpleRespectProfiles" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowBREncodedFixEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowCustomPropertyEditor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowDeployAsActiveEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowFieldFilterEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowFormulasFixEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowInterviewSharingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowNullPreviousValueFix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowPauseEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowReactiveScreens" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowUseApexExceptionEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFlowViaRestUsesUserCtxt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLightningRuntimeEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isAccessToInvokedApexRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isApexPluginAccessModifierRespected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isEnhancedFlowListViewVisible" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isFlowApexContextRetired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isFlowBlockAccessToSessionIDEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isManageFlowRequiredForAutomationCharts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isSupportRollbackOnErrorForApexInvocableActionsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isTimeResumedInSameRunContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
